creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
FreeBSD ports commit dd1496c651a27f6327bf030f8671e7291012cc69 introduced using autoreconf for building gnupg. https://www.reddit.com/r/Fedora/comments/17ryzmr/did_fedora_really_just_pushed_a_development/ explains what is happening because of this and points to https://salsa.debian.org/debian/gnupg2/-/blob/debian/unstable/debian/patches/debian-packaging/avoid-beta-warning.patch for fixing it.

-- Martin
